nodes.name: checkstyle.xml
nodes.summary: Checkstyle configuration defining Java code style rules for all modules in the RisingWave Java project.

nodes.name: suppressions.xml
nodes.summary: Checkstyle suppressions file listing files or modules excluded from specific Java style checks.

nodes.name: config.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo configuration for the custom lints crate, setting linker flags for macOS and Linux targets.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the RisingWave custom Dylint lint crate, declaring the lint library and UI test example.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Developer guide for the custom Dylint lints crate, covering installation, running, adding new lints, VS Code integration, and toolchain bumping.

nodes.name: rust-toolchain
nodes.summary: Rust toolchain pin file specifying the exact nightly Rust version for the custom lints crate.

nodes.name: format_error.rs
nodes.summary: UI test source file exercising the custom format_error lint, containing intentional error formatting patterns to verify lint diagnostics.

nodes.name: format_error.stderr
nodes.summary: Expected diagnostic output file for the format_error lint UI test, recording compiler errors and lint messages for regression testing.

nodes.name: risedev
nodes.summary: Shell wrapper script that delegates to the risedev-dev binary, providing the primary developer CLI entry point for building, running, and testing RisingWave.

nodes.name: rust-toolchain
nodes.summary: Root Rust toolchain file pinning the stable Rust version used across the entire RisingWave project.

nodes.name: check-trailing-spaces.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that scans tracked source files for trailing whitespace and reports violations, used in CI quality checks.

nodes.name: coredump.entitlements
nodes.summary: macOS entitlements plist granting the necessary permissions for core dump generation in RisingWave binaries during debugging.

nodes.name: install-risingwave.sh
nodes.summary: Installation script that downloads and installs the RisingWave binary for Linux and macOS from the GitHub releases page.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Brief README documenting the source helper scripts, with a section covering Kafka-related utilities.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the RisingWave batch crate, the top-level batch processing layer declaring executor and storage dependencies.

nodes.name: clippy.toml
nodes.summary: Clippy configuration for the batch crate defining allowed complexity thresholds and lint overrides.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Guide for the batch executor micro-benchmarks, explaining how to run Criterion benchmarks and add new ones.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the batch executors crate, declaring dependencies and bench targets for all physical executor implementations.

nodes.name: expand.rs
nodes.summary: Implements ExpandExecutor for the SQL EXPAND/ROLLUP operation, producing one output row per column subset with a grouping ID column appended.

nodes.name: log_row_seq_scan.rs
nodes.summary: Implements LogRowSeqScanExecutor for reading change log rows from Hummock across an epoch range, used in CDC and log store queries.

nodes.name: merge_sort.rs
nodes.summary: Implements MergeSortExecutor that merges multiple sorted input streams into a single globally sorted output using a min-heap.

nodes.name: order_by.rs
nodes.summary: Implements SortExecutor for ORDER BY queries with spill-to-disk support via SortSpillManager when memory is exhausted.

nodes.name: sort_over_window.rs
nodes.summary: Implements SortOverWindowExecutor for window function evaluation over sorted partitions, accumulating rows per partition and generating output.

nodes.name: vector_index_nearest.rs
nodes.summary: Implements VectorIndexNearestExecutor for approximate nearest neighbor queries against a vector index via epoch-snapshot reads.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the RisingWave bench crate, declaring dependencies and the benchmark binary for storage and streaming performance testing.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Main function with intentional error-formatting patterns used to test and verify custom lint diagnostics for the format_error lint rule.

nodes.name: ExpandExecutor
nodes.summary: Batch executor for the SQL EXPAND operation, iterating over column subsets and emitting one output chunk per subset with a grouping ID.

nodes.name: do_execute
nodes.summary: Async generator that reads input chunks, replicates each row across column subsets, appends a grouping ID column, and yields output chunks.

nodes.name: new
nodes.summary: Constructs an ExpandExecutor, computing the output schema by extending input fields with a grouping ID field for each subset.

nodes.name: new_boxed_executor
nodes.summary: Builder method that parses protobuf expand node column subsets and constructs a boxed ExpandExecutor from plan inputs.

nodes.name: LogRowSeqScanExecutor
nodes.summary: Batch executor that sequentially scans Hummock log-store rows between old and new epochs for CDC and log store query support.

nodes.name: LogStoreRowSeqScanExecutorBuilder
nodes.summary: Builder struct implementing the executor builder trait for LogRowSeqScanExecutor, parsing plan node parameters.

nodes.name: new
nodes.summary: Constructs a LogRowSeqScanExecutor, extending the table schema with an op column for change log operation types.

nodes.name: new_boxed_executor
nodes.summary: Parses a log store seq scan plan node, sets up vnode bitmap and scan range, and constructs the boxed executor.

nodes.name: do_execute
nodes.summary: Async generator that executes scan ranges in parallel and yields data chunks with change log rows and op column.

nodes.name: execute_range
nodes.summary: Iterates over a single scan range in Hummock log store, converting change log rows to data chunks with operation type appended.

nodes.name: MergeSortExecutor
nodes.summary: Batch executor that merges multiple pre-sorted input streams into a globally sorted output using a memory-monitored min-heap.

nodes.name: do_execute
nodes.summary: Core merge algorithm that repeatedly pops the minimum row from the heap, appends it to the output chunk, and refills from the input stream.

nodes.name: get_input_chunk
nodes.summary: Fetches the next non-empty chunk from an input stream, tracking heap memory usage for the memory monitor.

nodes.name: new
nodes.summary: Constructs a MergeSortExecutor with memory-monitored heap and pre-allocated chunk storage for each input stream.

nodes.name: SortExecutor
nodes.summary: Batch executor implementing ORDER BY with optional spill-to-disk, collecting all input rows, sorting, and emitting sorted chunks.

nodes.name: SortSpillManager
nodes.summary: Manages spill partitions for SortExecutor when memory is exceeded, writing and reading sorted data from object storage.

nodes.name: do_execute
nodes.summary: Core sort execution: collects input rows with memory tracking, sorts in-memory or falls back to external merge sort via spill when memory is tight.

nodes.name: new_boxed_executor
nodes.summary: Builder method that parses column orders from the plan node and constructs a spill-aware SortExecutor from context configuration.

nodes.name: new_inner
nodes.summary: Internal constructor for SortExecutor that wires up child executor, memory context, and optional spill backend with memory upper bound.

nodes.name: SortOverWindowExecutor
nodes.summary: Batch executor for window functions over sorted input, grouping rows by partition key and applying window function state machines per partition.

nodes.name: ExecutorInner
nodes.summary: Inner configuration struct for SortOverWindowExecutor holding window function calls, partition/order key indices, and chunk size.

nodes.name: new_boxed_executor
nodes.summary: Parses window function calls and partition/order keys from the plan node, extending the schema and constructing the executor.

nodes.name: do_execute
nodes.summary: Collects input rows, groups them by partition key, and calls gen_output_for_partition for each partition to produce output chunks.

nodes.name: gen_output_for_partition
nodes.summary: Applies window function states to all rows in a partition, appending computed window values and yielding output rows to the chunk builder.

nodes.name: VectorIndexNearestExecutor
nodes.summary: Batch executor performing approximate nearest neighbor vector search by reading from a vector index at a specific query epoch.

nodes.name: VectorIndexNearestExecutorBuilder
nodes.summary: Builder struct for VectorIndexNearestExecutor, parsing plan node parameters and constructing the executor.

nodes.name: new_boxed_executor
nodes.summary: Parses the vector index plan node, resolves the vector column index, and constructs a boxed VectorIndexNearestExecutor.

nodes.name: do_execute
nodes.summary: Reads input chunks, opens a vector index snapshot at the query epoch, and calls query_expand_chunk for nearest neighbor expansion.
